initial_candidates.sql:
WITH daily_sales AS (
    SELECT 
        DATE(o.order_purchase_timestamp) AS sale_date,
        SUM(oi.price) AS total_sales
    FROM order_items oi
    JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
    JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id
    WHERE p.product_category_name = 'toys'
      AND DATE(o.order_purchase_timestamp) BETWEEN '2017-01-01' AND '2018-08-29'
    GROUP BY DATE(o.order_purchase_timestamp)
),
regression AS (
    SELECT 
        AVG(sale_date_julian) AS x_mean,
        AVG(total_sales) AS y_mean,
        SUM((sale_date_julian - (SELECT AVG(sale_date_julian) FROM (
            SELECT julianday(sale_date) AS sale_date_julian FROM daily_sales
        ))) * (total_sales - (SELECT AVG(total_sales) FROM daily_sales))) /
        NULLIF(SUM(POWER((sale_date_julian - (SELECT AVG(sale_date_julian) FROM (
            SELECT julianday(sale_date) AS sale_date_julian FROM daily_sales
        )), 2)), 0) AS slope,
        (SELECT AVG(total_sales) FROM daily_sales) - 
        (SUM((sale_date_julian - (SELECT AVG(sale_date_julian) FROM (
            SELECT julianday(sale_date) AS sale_date_julian FROM daily_sales
        ))) * (total_sales - (SELECT AVG(total_sales) FROM daily_sales))) /
        NULLIF(SUM(POWER((sale_date_julian - (SELECT AVG(sale_date_julian) FROM (
            SELECT julianday(sale_date) AS sale_date_julian FROM daily_sales
        )), 2)), 0)) * (SELECT AVG(sale_date_julian) FROM (
            SELECT julianday(sale_date) AS sale_date_julian FROM daily_sales
        )) AS intercept
    FROM (
        SELECT julianday(sale_date) AS sale_date_julian, total_sales
        FROM daily_sales
    )
},
predicted_sales AS (
    SELECT 
        '2018-12-05' AS sale_date,
        (SELECT slope FROM regression) * julianday('2018-12-05') + (SELECT intercept FROM regression) AS predicted
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        '2018-12-06',
        (SELECT slope FROM regression) * julianday('2018-12-06') + (SELECT intercept FROM regression)
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        '2018-12-07',
        (SELECT slope FROM regression) * julianday('2018-12-07') + (SELECT intercept FROM regression)
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        '2018-12-08',
        (SELECT slope FROM regression) * julianday('2018-12-08') + (SELECT intercept FROM regression)
),
moving_averages AS (
    SELECT 
        sale_date,
        AVG(predicted) OVER (
            ORDER BY sale_date
            ROWS BETWEEN 2 PRECEDING AND 2 FOLLOWING
        ) AS symmetric_5_day_ma
    FROM predicted_sales
)
SELECT 
    SUM(symmetric_5_day_ma) AS total_symmetric_moving_averages
FROM moving_averages
WHERE sale_date BETWEEN '2018-12-05' AND '2018-12-08';

WITH daily_sales AS (
    SELECT 
        DATE(o.order_purchase_timestamp) AS sale_date,
        SUM(oi.price) AS daily_sales_amount
    FROM order_items oi
    JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
    WHERE o.order_purchase_timestamp >= '2017-01-01'
      AND o.order_purchase_timestamp <= '2018-08-29'
    GROUP BY DATE(o.order_purchase_timestamp)
),
regression_params AS (
    SELECT 
        AVG(sale_date) AS mean_date,
        AVG(daily_sales_amount) AS mean_sales,
        SUM((strftime('%J', sale_date) - AVG(strftime('%J', sale_date))) * 
            (daily_sales_amount - AVG(daily_sales_amount))) /
        NULLIF(SUM((strftime('%J', sale_date) - AVG(strftime('%J', sale_date))) * 
                   (strftime('%J', sale_date) - AVG(strftime('%J', sale_date)))), 0) AS slope,
        AVG(daily_sales_amount) - 
        (SUM((strftime('%J', sale_date) - AVG(strftime('%J', sale_date))) * 
             (daily_sales_amount - AVG(daily_sales_amount))) /
         NULLIF(SUM((strftime('%J', sale_date) - AVG(strftime('%J', sale_date))) * 
                    (strftime('%J', sale_date) - AVG(strftime('%J', sale_date)))), 0)) * 
        AVG(strftime('%J', sale_date)) AS intercept
    FROM daily_sales
),
predicted_sales AS (
    SELECT 
        '2018-12-05' AS sale_date,
        (SELECT slope FROM regression_params) * strftime('%J', '2018-12-05') + 
        (SELECT intercept FROM regression_params) AS predicted_sales
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        '2018-12-06' AS sale_date,
        (SELECT slope FROM regression_params) * strftime('%J', '2018-12-06') + 
        (SELECT intercept FROM regression_params) AS predicted_sales
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        '2018-12-07' AS sale_date,
        (SELECT slope FROM regression_params) * strftime('%J', '2018-12-07') + 
        (SELECT intercept FROM regression_params) AS predicted_sales
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        '2018-12-08' AS sale_date,
        (SELECT slope FROM regression_params) * strftime('%J', '2018-12-08') + 
        (SELECT intercept FROM regression_params) AS predicted_sales
),
symmetric_ma AS (
    SELECT 
        sale_date,
        (LAG(predicted_sales, 2) OVER (ORDER BY sale_date) +
         LAG(predicted_sales, 1) OVER (ORDER BY sale_date) +
         predicted_sales +
         LEAD(predicted_sales, 1) OVER (ORDER BY sale_date) +
         LEAD(predicted_sales, 2) OVER (ORDER BY sale_date)) / 5.0 AS symmetric_ma
    FROM predicted_sales
)
SELECT 
    SUM(symmetric_ma) AS sum_of_ma
FROM symmetric_ma
WHERE sale_date BETWEEN '2018-12-05' AND '2018-12-08';

WITH daily_sales AS (
    SELECT 
        DATE(o.order_purchase_timestamp) AS sale_date,
        SUM(oi.price) AS total_sales
    FROM order_items oi
    JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
    JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id
    WHERE p.product_category_name = 'toys'
      AND DATE(o.order_purchase_timestamp) BETWEEN '2017-01-01' AND '2018-08-29'
    GROUP BY DATE(o.order_purchase_timestamp)
),
regression_params AS (
    SELECT 
        COUNT(*) AS n,
        SUM(DJULIAN(sale_date)) AS sum_x,
        SUM(total_sales) AS sum_y,
        SUM(DJULIAN(sale_date) * DJULIAN(sale_date)) AS sum_x2,
        SUM(DJULIAN(sale_date) * total_sales) AS sum_xy
    FROM daily_sales
),
coefficients AS (
    SELECT 
        (n * sum_xy - sum_x * sum_y) / (n * sum_x2 - sum_x * sum_x) AS slope,
        (sum_y - slope * sum_x) / n AS intercept
    FROM regression_params
),
predicted_sales AS (
    SELECT 
        '2018-12-05' AS sale_date,
        (SELECT intercept FROM coefficients) + (SELECT slope FROM coefficients) * DJULIAN('2018-12-05') AS predicted
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        '2018-12-06' AS sale_date,
        (SELECT intercept FROM coefficients) + (SELECT slope FROM coefficients) * DJULIAN('2018-12-06') AS predicted
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        '2018-12-07' AS sale_date,
        (SELECT intercept FROM coefficients) + (SELECT slope FROM coefficients) * DJULIAN('2018-12-07') AS predicted
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        '2018-12-08' AS sale_date,
        (SELECT intercept FROM coefficients) + (SELECT slope FROM coefficients) * DJULIAN('2018-12-08') AS predicted
),
symmetric_ma AS (
    SELECT 
        ps1.sale_date,
        (ps1.predicted + ps2.predicted + ps3.predicted + ps4.predicted + ps5.predicted) / 5.0 AS ma5_symmetric
    FROM predicted_sales ps1
    JOIN predicted_sales ps2 ON ps2.sale_date = DATE(ps1.sale_date, '+1 day')
    JOIN predicted_sales ps3 ON ps3.sale_date = DATE(ps1.sale_date, '+2 day')
    JOIN predicted_sales ps4 ON ps4.sale_date = DATE(ps1.sale_date, '+3 day')
    JOIN predicted_sales ps5 ON ps5.sale_date = DATE(ps1.sale_date, '+4 day')
    WHERE ps1.sale_date IN ('2018-12-05', '2018-12-06', '2018-12-07')
)
SELECT 
    SUM(ma5_symmetric) AS total_ma5_symmetric
FROM symmetric_ma;

WITH daily_sales AS (
    SELECT 
        DATE(o.order_purchase_timestamp) AS sale_date,
        SUM(oi.price) AS daily_sales_amount
    FROM order_items oi
    JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
    WHERE o.order_purchase_timestamp >= '2017-01-01' 
      AND o.order_purchase_timestamp <= '2018-08-29'
    GROUP BY DATE(o.order_purchase_timestamp)
),
regression AS (
    SELECT 
        AVG(sale_date) AS avg_date,
        AVG(daily_sales_amount) AS avg_sales,
        SUM((sale_date - (SELECT AVG(sale_date) FROM daily_sales)) * 
            (daily_sales_amount - (SELECT AVG(daily_sales_amount) FROM daily_sales))) /
        NULLIF(SUM((sale_date - (SELECT AVG(sale_date) FROM daily_sales)) * 
                   (sale_date - (SELECT AVG(sale_date) FROM daily_sales))), 0) AS slope,
        (SELECT AVG(daily_sales_amount) FROM daily_sales) - 
        (SUM((sale_date - (SELECT AVG(sale_date) FROM daily_sales)) * 
             (daily_sales_amount - (SELECT AVG(daily_sales_amount) FROM daily_sales))) /
         NULLIF(SUM((sale_date - (SELECT AVG(sale_date) FROM daily_sales)) * 
                    (sale_date - (SELECT AVG(sale_date) FROM daily_sales))), 0) *
         (SELECT AVG(sale_date) FROM daily_sales)) AS intercept
    FROM daily_sales
),
predicted_sales AS (
    SELECT 
        '2018-12-05' AS sale_date, 
        (SELECT slope FROM regression) * julianday('2018-12-05') + (SELECT intercept FROM regression) AS predicted_sales
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        '2018-12-06', 
        (SELECT slope FROM regression) * julianday('2018-12-06') + (SELECT intercept FROM regression)
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        '2018-12-07', 
        (SELECT slope FROM regression) * julianday('2018-12-07') + (SELECT intercept FROM regression)
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        '2018-12-08', 
        (SELECT slope FROM regression) * julianday('2018-12-08') + (SELECT intercept FROM regression)
),
moving_avg AS (
    SELECT 
        sale_date,
        predicted_sales,
        AVG(predicted_sales) OVER (
            ORDER BY sale_date 
            ROWS BETWEEN 2 PRECEDING AND 2 FOLLOWING
        ) AS symmetric_5day_ma
    FROM predicted_sales
    WHERE sale_date BETWEEN '2018-12-05' AND '2018-12-08'
)
SELECT 
    SUM(symmetric_5day_ma) AS total_symmetric_ma
FROM moving_avg;

WITH daily_sales AS (
    SELECT 
        DATE(o.order_purchase_timestamp) AS sale_date,
        SUM(oi.price) AS daily_sales_amount
    FROM order_items oi
    JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
    WHERE o.order_purchase_timestamp >= '2017-01-01'
      AND o.order_purchase_timestamp <= '2018-08-29'
      AND oi.shipping_limit_date IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY DATE(o.order_purchase_timestamp)
),
regression_params AS (
    SELECT 
        COUNT(*) AS n,
        SUM(JULIANDAY(sale_date)) AS sum_x,
        SUM(daily_sales_amount) AS sum_y,
        SUM(JULIANDAY(sale_date) * daily_sales_amount) AS sum_xy,
        SUM(JULIANDAY(sale_date) * JULIANDAY(sale_date)) AS sum_xx
    FROM daily_sales
),
slope_intercept AS (
    SELECT 
        (n * sum_xy - sum_x * sum_y) / (n * sum_xx - sum_x * sum_x) AS slope,
        (sum_y - (SELECT slope FROM slope_intercept) * sum_x) / n AS intercept
    FROM regression_params
),
predicted_sales AS (
    SELECT 
        '2018-12-05' AS sale_date,
        (SELECT intercept FROM slope_intercept) + (SELECT slope FROM slope_intercept) * JULIANDAY('2018-12-05') AS predicted
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        '2018-12-06' AS sale_date,
        (SELECT intercept FROM slope_intercept) + (SELECT slope FROM slope_intercept) * JULIANDAY('2018-12-06') AS predicted
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        '2018-12-07' AS sale_date,
        (SELECT intercept FROM slope_intercept) + (SELECT slope FROM slope_intercept) * JULIANDAY('2018-12-07') AS predicted
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        '2018-12-08' AS sale_date,
        (SELECT intercept FROM slope_intercept) + (SELECT slope FROM slope_intercept) * JULIANDAY('2018-12-08') AS predicted
),
moving_averages AS (
    SELECT 
        sale_date,
        AVG(predicted) OVER (
            ORDER BY sale_date
            ROWS BETWEEN 2 PRECEDING AND 2 FOLLOWING
        ) AS sym_moving_avg
    FROM predicted_sales
)
SELECT 
    SUM(sym_moving_avg) AS total_symmetric_moving_avg
FROM moving_averages
WHERE sale_date BETWEEN '2018-12-05' AND '2018-12-08';

aggregation.selected_sql:
WITH daily_sales AS (
    SELECT 
        DATE(o.order_purchase_timestamp) AS sale_date,
        SUM(oi.price) AS daily_sales_amount
    FROM order_items oi
    JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
    WHERE o.order_purchase_timestamp >= '2017-01-01' 
      AND o.order_purchase_timestamp <= '2018-08-29'
    GROUP BY DATE(o.order_purchase_timestamp)
),
regression AS (
    SELECT 
        AVG(sale_date) AS avg_date,
        AVG(daily_sales_amount) AS avg_sales,
        SUM((sale_date - (SELECT AVG(sale_date) FROM daily_sales)) * 
            (daily_sales_amount - (SELECT AVG(daily_sales_amount) FROM daily_sales))) /
        NULLIF(SUM((sale_date - (SELECT AVG(sale_date) FROM daily_sales)) * 
                   (sale_date - (SELECT AVG(sale_date) FROM daily_sales))), 0) AS slope,
        (SELECT AVG(daily_sales_amount) FROM daily_sales) - 
        (SUM((sale_date - (SELECT AVG(sale_date) FROM daily_sales)) * 
             (daily_sales_amount - (SELECT AVG(daily_sales_amount) FROM daily_sales))) /
         NULLIF(SUM((sale_date - (SELECT AVG(sale_date) FROM daily_sales)) * 
                    (sale_date - (SELECT AVG(sale_date) FROM daily_sales))), 0) *
         (SELECT AVG(sale_date) FROM daily_sales)) AS intercept
    FROM daily_sales
),
predicted_sales AS (
    SELECT 
        '2018-12-05' AS sale_date, 
        (SELECT slope FROM regression) * julianday('2018-12-05') + (SELECT intercept FROM regression) AS predicted_sales
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        '2018-12-06', 
        (SELECT slope FROM regression) * julianday('2018-12-06') + (SELECT intercept FROM regression)
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        '2018-12-07', 
        (SELECT slope FROM regression) * julianday('2018-12-07') + (SELECT intercept FROM regression)
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        '2018-12-08', 
        (SELECT slope FROM regression) * julianday('2018-12-08') + (SELECT intercept FROM regression)
),
moving_avg AS (
    SELECT 
        sale_date,
        predicted_sales,
        AVG(predicted_sales) OVER (
            ORDER BY sale_date 
            ROWS BETWEEN 2 PRECEDING AND 2 FOLLOWING
        ) AS symmetric_5day_ma
    FROM predicted_sales
    WHERE sale_date BETWEEN '2018-12-05' AND '2018-12-08'
)
SELECT 
    SUM(symmetric_5day_ma) AS total_symmetric_ma
FROM moving_avg;
